text: | ELB Architecture @ isemotie @) st e ELB is a DNS A Record pointing at 1+ Nodes per AZ * Nodes (in one subnet per AZ) can scale ¢ Internet-facing means nodes have public IPv4 IPs e Internal is private only IPs * EC2 doesn’t need to be public to work with a LB e Listener Configuration controls WHAT the LB does * 8+ Free IPs per subnet, and /27 subnet to allow scaling
